case_title: CLIFTON A. RAINE VS. GEOFFREY NEWMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $264.00 FILED BY RAINE, CLIFTON A. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, GEOFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAINE, CLIFTON A. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-08-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAINE, CLIFTON A.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-02-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-08-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, GEOFFREY
AN AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE SERVED ON GEOFFREY NEWMAN BY SUBSTITUTED SERVICE, FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAINE, CLIFTON A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEWMAN, GEOFFREY ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, IT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO RETURN ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL PROPERTY STILL IN HIS POSSESSION TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN SEVEN DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAINE, CLIFTON A.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
